started using @NousResearch Hermes + GPT 5.6 Sol a few weeks ago for wedding planning. wish i’d done it this way sooner

saved my life from the hell that is the seating chart and having to account for all the who-likes-who etc.

we also have a similar no-DM policy, but it's been hard to make it stick. project discussions still end up slipping into DMs and subset chats. might be time to try something like to this.

- Ownership
- Systems that evolve with feedback
- Room to experiment
- Safety to make mistakes

but that also gives builders room to experiment, figure out what works, and be ready when the market picks up again. you can’t get
